18.sourceTitle: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - 44mm
18.evidenceText: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - 44mm. Utilizes Clik Valves for best-in-class performance; Increased durability, increased air flow, and intuitive connection
18.extractionRationale: Only one distinct third-party accessory product is documented: the Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit. Although available in 9 colors, color variations count as the same product. The source explicitly states this product is designed for Clik Valve compatibility.

37.sourceTitle: CoreCap Valve Cap Set - BBB Cycling
37.evidenceText: Product information Features Size guide Specifications Spare parts Find a dealer.
37.extractionRationale: The evidence mentions a "Spare parts" section exists on the product page, but the actual list of spare part SKUs and their details is not included in the provided content excerpt. Without access to the complete spare parts listing, I cannot count the distinct replacement/spare part SKUs.

45.evidenceText: All DT Swiss wheelsets are tubeless compatible and the ASM versions come tubeless ready, equipped with tubeless tape and valves. The DT Swiss tubeless valve perfectly matches DT Swiss rims, to ensure a perfect seal for long, hassle-free rides.
45.extractionRationale: No evidence of Clik valve adoption found. DT Swiss sources consistently reference their proprietary "DT Swiss tubeless valve" as their standard. No information about Clik valve adoption by any of the six major brands (DT Swiss, Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, Roval) is present in the provided sources. Therefore, 0% of major brands have converted to Clik valve.

57.evidenceText: No stock status, availability date, or back-in-stock information found in the provided sources.
57.extractionRationale: The three sources provided contain only product listing information (names, features, related products) but do not include any inventory status, stock availability dates, or restock timeline information needed to calculate B2B turnaround time.
